prompt:
Goal: Create a clean futuristic anime character specification poster for a cat-eared android girl, titled CA-08, with the subtitle CAT-EARED GYNOID.

Canvas: Square 1:1 portrait poster on an off-white background, high-resolution, centered character bust occupying most of the frame, with generous technical-design margins and asymmetrical UI markings.

Subject details: Show a three-quarter rear/side bust portrait of a young female gynoid looking back over her shoulder toward the viewer. She has pale skin, soft golden eyes, a calm neutral expression, and long messy black hair with vivid orange-yellow streaks. Her hair forms one thick braid over the right side, with loose strands and a heavy fringe across her forehead. She has large mechanical black cat ears with glowing orange inner panels, visible screws, seams, and small labels. The right side of her head exposes cybernetic headphone-like machinery: circular orange-and-black audio module, metal plates, cables, and tiny mechanical connectors. Her neck is exposed as a dense robotic spine of black, silver, and orange tubes, pistons, beads, and segmented cables.

Body and outfit: She wears a white and black futuristic android torso with a large white armored shoulder shell, black inner mechanical joints, orange cable details, small screws, warning triangle markings, and repeated CA-08 decals. The chest is partly visible at lower left, sleek but not explicit. Add black straps and modular back components with two stacked rectangular black tech packs labeled CA-08, plus a small yellow cat icon module. Use white armor panels with subtle gray shading, black understructure, and orange highlights.

Layout and visible graphic elements: Include exactly 12 distinct interface/text elements around the character: 1) top-left large bold text “CA-08”; 2) directly below it, subtitle “CAT-EARED GYNOID”; 3) a yellow square badge with three white diagonal bars; 4) a small spec block reading “MODEL: CA-08 / TYPE: GYNOID / CLASS: NEUTRAL”; 5) a horizontal black barcode; 6) left vertical text “NEURAL LINK : ACTIVE” with tiny yellow marks; 7) bottom-left black cat-head icon above “ANDROID SERIES” and large “CA”; 8) top-right black cat-head icon; 9) top-right black diagonal stripe mark; 10) a small plus sign and dotted vertical calibration marks on the right; 11) right-side vertical text “CYBERNETIC ORGANISM” beside a thin vertical line and small yellow square; 12) bottom-right large number “08” with small text “DESIGNATION CA-08” and three yellow diagonal bars.

Visual style: Polished anime illustration mixed with industrial product-spec graphic design, crisp line art, soft cel shading, realistic mechanical detailing, high contrast black/white/orange palette, subtle gray shadows, clean negative space, precise typography, sci-fi design-sheet aesthetic.

Constraints: Keep the composition portrait-oriented within a square poster, no background scenery, no extra characters, no watermark, no messy text beyond the specified labels, and maintain the monochrome plus orange technical color scheme.
